# Pillio

> Pillio is a leading pharmacy platform provider that digitizes pharmacy operations, acting as an extra pharmacist in your store to boost patient experience and shorten service times.

Pillio provides easily installable digital tools for pharmacies to streamline workflows, ensure regulatory compliance, and enhance customer service.

## Key Benefits

- 40% reduction in administrative tasks
- 24/7 digital patient support
- 100% compliance-ready documentation
- Faster prescription processing
- Reduced dispensing errors

## Target Audience

- Independent pharmacies
- Pharmacy chains
- OTC retailers
- Healthcare providers

## Contact

- Website: https://pillio.app
- Demo booking: https://pillio.app/pharmacy.html#booking
